name: @gamopls/auth
description: Self-issued JWT issuance/verification for org_id/fleet_id/role/user_id claims. Used by apps/web's demo login flow and its BFF gateway route handlers to enforce multi-tenancy scoping before requests reach map/chat/board/hub. Swappable for Auth0/Clerk later — this is a V1 placeholder identity layer, not a full user-management system.
